title: pelargonium × deburghae
intro: Pelargonium × deburghae, also known as the Van Staden's rose-scented geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant within the geranium family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to its ability to promote relaxation and calmness. Pelargonium × deburghae can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits and health advantages.
